stem: The pseudocode below should print the numbers 1 to 10 and then the total.
review_notes: Rendered in monospace. Accept lists permit common equivalent forms.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Complete the pseudocode by filling each gap.

mark_points.text: print the total after the loop

misconceptions.label: Off-by-one in loop bound
misconceptions.description: Using 9 instead of 10 stops the loop one iteration short; `for i = 1 to 10` is inclusive in OCR pseudocode.
